category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95 / GB 19083) to the Cameroon market (ANOR conformity adopting NC/EN 149, PECAE import inspection, French-language documentation, occupational-safety framework).

title.en: China-to-Cameroon PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入喀麦隆（ANOR）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入喀麥隆（ANOR）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626 / GB 19083) documentation against Cameroon market-access requirements: ANOR conformity adopting Norme Camerounaise based on EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3), PECAE conformity assessment and pre-shipment import inspection, French-language documentation, the occupational-safety framework, the in-country importer obligation, and medical masks routed via the national health regulator.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件与喀麦隆市场准入要求对照，涵盖ANOR采用基于EN 149的喀麦隆国家标准（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的合格评定、PECAE合格评定与装运前进口检验、法语文件、职业安全框架、本地进口商义务，以及经国家卫生监管机构办理的医用口罩路径。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626/GB 19083）文件與喀麥隆市場准入要求對照，涵蓋ANOR採用基於EN 149的喀麥隆國家標準（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）的合格評定、PECAE合格評定與裝運前進口檢驗、法語文件、職業安全框架、本地進口商義務，以及經國家衛生監管機構辦理的醫用口罩路徑。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, conformity assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Cameroon law, ANOR standards, the PECAE conformity programme scope, and import-inspection practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market. The PPE-vs-medical mask boundary described herein requires case-by-case legal and regulatory analysis.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、合格评定、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行喀麦隆法律、ANOR标准、PECAE合格评定项目范围及进口检验实践。本文所述的PPE与医用口罩界定需要逐案进行法律及法规分析。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、合格評定、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行喀麥隆法律、ANOR標準、PECAE合格評定項目範圍及進口檢驗實踐。本文所述的PPE與醫用口罩界定需要逐案進行法律及法規分析。

answer_first.en: FFP filtering respirators entering Cameroon are assessed by ANOR (Agence des Normes et de la Qualite), which adopts a Norme Camerounaise aligned with the EN 149 (FFP1/FFP2/FFP3) family. Conformity and pre-shipment import inspection run through the PECAE programme (Programme d'Evaluation de la Conformite Avant Embarquement), product documentation must be in French, and a locally established importer is required. Chinese KN95 (GB 2626) test reports do not by themselves satisfy the NC/EN 149 route. A boundary applies: medical/surgical masks are routed via the national health regulator, not the occupational-PPE framework, so the wrong classification triggers a different route.
answer_first.zh: 进入喀麦隆的FFP过滤呼吸器由ANOR（标准与质量局）评定，其采用与EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）系列对齐的喀麦隆国家标准。合格评定与装运前进口检验通过PECAE项目（装运前合格评定项目）办理，产品文件须为法语，且须有本地设立的进口商。中国KN95（GB 2626）检测报告本身不满足NC/EN 149路径。存在界定：医用/外科口罩经国家卫生监管机构办理，而非职业PPE框架——错误分类将触发不同路径。
answer_first.zht: 進入喀麥隆的FFP過濾呼吸器由ANOR（標準與質量局）評定，其採用與EN 149（FFP1/FFP2/FFP3）系列對齊的喀麥隆國家標準。合格評定與裝運前進口檢驗通過PECAE項目（裝運前合格評定項目）辦理，產品文件須為法語，且須有本地設立的進口商。中國KN95（GB 2626）檢測報告本身不滿足NC/EN 149路徑。存在界定：醫用/外科口罩經國家衛生監管機構辦理，而非職業PPE框架——錯誤分類將觸發不同路徑。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Rows are AI-generated drafts; named human review required before human_reviewed can be set true.
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be true. Official regulator or standards-body sources preferred; local PDFs not accepted.
